'''鈭歬-d-zh''' ('''kakadazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quackle|quackle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quackle|quackle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-d-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kakadazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadazh|thikadazh]] || [[word:jikadazh|jikadazh]] || [[word:shikadazh|shikadazh]] || [[word:kikadazh|kikadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukadazh|thuthukadazh]] || [[word:jujukadazh|jujukadazh]] || [[word:shushukadazh|shushukadazh]] || [[word:kukukadazh|kukukadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukadazh|thukadazh]] || [[word:jukadazh|jukadazh]] || [[word:shukadazh|shukadazh]] || [[word:kukadazh|kukadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukadazh|thukadazh]] || [[word:jukadazh|jukadazh]] || [[word:shukadazh|shukadazh]] || [[word:kukadazh|kukadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekadazh|thekadazh]] || [[word:jekadazh|jekadazh]] || [[word:shekadazh|shekadazh]] || [[word:kekadazh|kekadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokadazh|thothokadazh]] || [[word:jojokadazh|jojokadazh]] || [[word:shoshokadazh|shoshokadazh]] || [[word:kokokadazh|kokokadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokadazh|thokadazh]] || [[word:jokadazh|jokadazh]] || [[word:shokadazh|shokadazh]] || [[word:kokadazh|kokadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokadazh|thokadazh]] || [[word:jokadazh|jokadazh]] || [[word:shokadazh|shokadazh]] || [[word:kokadazh|kokadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kadazh|th忙kadazh]] || [[word:j忙kadazh|j忙kadazh]] || [[word:sh忙kadazh|sh忙kadazh]] || [[word:k忙kadazh|k忙kadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakadazh|thathakadazh]] || [[word:jajakadazh|jajakadazh]] || [[word:shashakadazh|shashakadazh]] || [[word:kakakadazh|kakakadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadazh|thakadazh]] || [[word:jakadazh|jakadazh]] || [[word:shakadazh|shakadazh]] || [[word:kakadazh|kakadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakadazh|thakadazh]] || [[word:jakadazh|jakadazh]] || [[word:shakadazh|shakadazh]] || [[word:kakadazh|kakadazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakadazh|shakadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakadazh|goshakadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakadazh|gokishakadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakadazhn眉|shakadazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkn眉|goshakadazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadazhn眉|gokishakadazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakadazhsh毛|shakadazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakadazhnksh毛|goshakadazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakadazhsh毛|gokishakadazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadazhro|shakadazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkro|goshakadazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadazhro|gokishakadazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadazhmu|shakadazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkmu|goshakadazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadazhmu|gokishakadazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakadazhsher|shakadazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakadazhnksher|goshakadazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakadazhsher|gokishakadazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakadazhng|shakadazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkng|goshakadazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakadazhng|gokishakadazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakadazhya|shakadazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkya|goshakadazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakadazhya|gokishakadazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakadazhyam|shakadazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkyam|goshakadazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakadazhyam|gokishakadazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadazhn眉sh毛|shakadazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkn眉sh毛|goshakadazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadazhn眉sh毛|gokishakadazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadazhn眉ro|shakadazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkn眉ro|goshakadazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadazhn眉ro|gokishakadazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadazhn眉mu|shakadazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkn眉mu|goshakadazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadazhn眉mu|gokishakadazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadazhsh毛n眉|shakadazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadazhnksh毛n眉|goshakadazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadazhsh毛n眉|gokishakadazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadazhsh毛ro|shakadazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadazhnksh毛ro|goshakadazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadazhsh毛ro|gokishakadazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadazhsh毛mu|shakadazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadazhnksh毛mu|goshakadazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadazhsh毛mu|gokishakadazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadazhron眉|shakadazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkron眉|goshakadazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadazhron眉|gokishakadazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadazhrosh毛|shakadazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkrosh毛|goshakadazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadazhrosh毛|gokishakadazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakadazhromu|shakadazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkromu|goshakadazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakadazhromu|gokishakadazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakadazhmun眉|shakadazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkmun眉|goshakadazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakadazhmun眉|gokishakadazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakadazhmush毛|shakadazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkmush毛|goshakadazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakadazhmush毛|gokishakadazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakadazhmuro|shakadazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakadazhnkmuro|goshakadazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakadazhmuro|gokishakadazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
